payload.plan: API probed: Scheduler.Backend contract accepts catchUp skip|last|all; inProcess rejects last/all but the contract is public and schedule()'s tick closure execs the production flow. Design: solver implements a durable backend (injected store+clock); jobs capture={overlap:skip,catchUp:skip} vs upload={overlap:queue,catchUp:all} — opposite on both axes, neither pair present in invoice example. Checker constructs the production backend itself (store/now it controls) so a scripted backend cannot reach preset ports; catch-up proven by archive-port recorder counts/contents.
